title: How to create an annually recurring automation based on a date

posts.author: jamesrw (James Le Gallez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to create an annually recurring reminder based on a date and struggling. This is to remind me of an employee’s work anniversary every year, based on a date field, “Start Date”.

At the moment I have;

365 days after “Start Date” notify X

But obviously this only triggers once, I need it to trigger every year.

So I tried every time period but, this is set on a specific manually entered date, I can’t link it to the “Start Date” field.

Any ideas? Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey James,

Could this work for you?

This way the recipe will behave as a loop.

Let me know what you think

posts.cookedHtml:
